creator: nakaji@tutrp.tut.ac.jp
text:
>>>>> In <199907231124.UAA41009@jaga.fujita3.iis.u-tokyo.ac.jp> 
 >>>>>	MITA Yoshio <mita@jp.FreeBSD.org> wrote:
 
 MY> I, as a maintainer of japanese/vfghostscript5, noticed that some modification
 MY> to this port had been performed WITH NO INFORMATION to me.  Actually, this 
 MY> causes a severe incompatibility of Laser printer from Epson co, therefore it 
 MY> imposes a enormous inconvenience to the users (like myself, 3 days before 
 MY> my Ph.D pre-defence ;-)
 
 First, I apologize that I tried to modify the port WITH NO INFORMATION 
 to the maintainer.
 
 But, I did neither commit nor send-pr the modification. I just reported
 about lips drivers to ports-jp.
 
 Why did I get Cc: from Mita-san?
 
 ---
 NAKAJI Hiroyuki
